verse.name: v1
verse.lines: At the cross I saw salvation At the cross I saw the wickedness in me At the cross I saw my arrogance At the cross I saw amazing grace.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: At the cross I saw You crying At the cross I saw You praying for me At the cross I saw Your humnle heart At the cross I saw amazing grace

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You love me more than I am You love me inspite of my sinful ways You love me for who I am You love me inspite of my selfish ways.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: At the cross I saw salvation At the cross I saw your forgiveness to me At the cross I saw the beauty of faith At the cross I saw amazing grace.
